questions.question: What is the official command to scaffold a new Vue project?
Why is Vite recommended over Vue CLI (Webpack) for new Vue projects?
options: Vite supports TypeScript natively; Webpack requires a separate loader
Vite uses native ES modules for instant dev server startup; Webpack bundles everything first
Vite ships a built-in router; Webpack requires manual configuration
Vite is the only tool that supports Vue 3 Single-File Components
